html:
CRISPY SAMBALS

RAITA

INGREDIENTS

250 ml store-bought tzatziki,

20 ml whole cumin seeds

5 ml finely chopped garlic (or to taste)

 

METHOD

Mix everything together, spoon into a pretty bowl and serve alongside a curry dish.

 

 

CARROT SAMBAL

INGREDIENTS

250 ml store-bought carrot salad

15 ml finely chopped green chilli,

15 ml Woolies finely chopped ginger root

30 ml roughly chopped parsley

salt and white pepper to taste

optional: 45 ml coconut cream mixed with a little lemon juice, sugar and salt.

 

METHOD

Mix everything together, spoon into a pretty bowl and serve alongside a curry dish.

 

TOMATO SAMBAL

INGREDIENTS

45 ml of each of the following, cut into small cubes:

  • tomato,
  • red bell pepper,
  • cucumber
  • and onion.

salt, sugar, white pepper and white vinegar to taste

65 ml roughly chopped coriander leaves

 

METHOD

Mix everything together, spoon into a pretty bowl, let it stand for about half an hour for the flavours to develop and then serve alongside a curry dish.
